entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Management and conservation of agricultural resource base in an appropriate, economically viable and socially acceptable way

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESOURCE BASE
entities.description: The base of resources used in agriculture that requires management and conservation

entities.name: ECOSYSTEM RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capability of a system to anticipate, absorb, accommodate or recover from the effects of an undergoing change

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of output produced by crops

entities.name: CHEMICAL INPUTS
entities.description: Substances used to provide nutrition to crops and control pests and diseases

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: Organisms that cause damage to crops

entities.name: PATHOGEN RESISTANCE
entities.description: The development of resistance in pathogens to applied chemical agents

entities.name: SOIL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The capacity of soil to support crop growth

entities.name: NON-RENEWABLE SOURCES OF ENERGY
entities.description: Energy sources that are depleted by certain agricultural practices

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH PROMOTING RHIZOBACTERIA
entities.description: Bacteria that improve plant growth and disease control ensuring crop yields in a sustainable way

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The development and increase in size of plants

entities.name: DISEASE CONTROL
entities.description: The process of managing or eliminating diseases

entities.name: CROP YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area
